notes:
Use cdj500 for color; dj500 for B/W. Easiest way is to set up two queues, one color, the other B/W. Colors are a little muddy, but otherwise perfect.

Consumables/Refills: Uses color cartridge and B/W cartridge/head combo

drivers.name: cdj500
drivers.comments: This driver is available in the Ghostscript Printer Application
